<!-- Workspace-specific Copilot instructions for Next.js project -->

## Project Overview
This is a Next.js application with TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, and ESLint configured.

## Development Guidelines
- Use TypeScript for type safety
- Follow the App Router pattern for routing
- Use Tailwind CSS for styling
- Run ESLint before committing code
- Components are located in the `src/components` directory
- Pages follow Next.js App Router conventions in `src/app`

## Development Commands
- `npm run dev` - Start development server
- `npm run build` - Build for production
- `npm run start` - Start production server
- `npm run lint` - Run ESLint

## Coding Standards
- Use functional components with React hooks
- Keep components small and focused
- Use TypeScript interfaces for props
- Follow ESLint rules configured in `.eslintrc.json`
